chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1181 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.4361/2021 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 21-10-2021 Mr. Aamir Mustafa Kamario, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Waheed Bhanbhro, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Rukhsar Ali Shahani, Principal, Khairpur Medical College, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has filed statement along with copy of notification dated 05-10-2021, whereby Professor Rukhsar Ali Shahani has been appointed as Principal, Khairpur Medical College, Khairpur. Respondent No.5 stands relieved, therefore, this petition has served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
